introSection: Lightning was a wooden roller coaster located at Riverside Park in Agawam, Massachusetts, USA. Designed by John A. Miller, the ride replaced the Giant Dip. Lightning was formerly called Giant Coaster.
fullText: Lightning was a wooden roller coaster located at Riverside Park in Agawam, Massachusetts, USA. Designed by John A. Miller, the ride replaced the Giant Dip. Lightning was formerly called Giant Coaster.
